title: Man Vs. Wild
desc: Bear navigates Ireland's rugged terrain, scaling 2000ft cliffs, building fires, and foraging for food, and feasting on the carcass of a dead sheep.

title: WildFed
desc: Daniel faces the profound challenge of a bear hunt alongside Sam, a seasoned hunter and houndsman, testing courage, skill, and the bond forged in the wilderness pursuit.

desc: Chinese actor and singer Wang Yibo undertakes outdoor adventures in extreme environments.
